transcript:
Agent: Thank you for calling Synergex Med, this is Maria. How can I help you today?
Caller: Hi, I need to reschedule my appointment. It's currently on Thursday at 2 PM.
Agent: Of course, I'd be happy to help with that. Can I get your date of birth and the name of the provider you're seeing?
Caller: Sure, it's March 14th, 1978, and I see Dr. Reyes.
Agent: Thank you. I have your record here. Your current appointment is Thursday June 12th at 2 PM with Dr. Reyes at our Torrance location. Would you like to move that to a different day?
Caller: Yes, if possible next week, maybe Tuesday or Wednesday?
Agent: I have an opening on Tuesday June 17th at 11 AM and Wednesday June 18th at 3 PM. Which works better for you?
Caller: Tuesday at 11 works great.
Agent: Perfect. I've rescheduled your appointment to Tuesday June 17th at 11 AM with Dr. Reyes at the Torrance location. You'll receive a confirmation text shortly. Is there anything else I can help you with?
Caller: No, that's all. Thank you!
Agent: Of course, have a great day. Goodbye!
